subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Firayjat
subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Lord my God! I call upon Thee at this time when the accents of the dove of separation are raised
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی انادیک حین الذی تغن حمامه الفراق عن شطر العراق
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @power of the Manifestation of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @prayer for protection
